_comment: The fixture corpus manifest. `ScanFixtureTests.test_corpusSweep_...` reads this and runs the per-fixture invariants for every entry, so adding a face fixture is a one-line edit here + dropping the asset in the test bundle. `resource` is the bundled file's base name (no extension; FixtureSource probes png/jpg/jpeg/heic). `fitzpatrick` (I–VI) keeps the corpus honest across skin tones — a redness/a* metric that only works on Fitz II-III is a known failure mode (see verdict-app derm-eval). Keep at least one fixture per Fitzpatrick band you ship to.

rgbFixtures.note: well-lit, frontal, neutral expression — the baseline golden
the worked example in ScanFixtureTests + Goldens/
darker skin — guards against a metric tuned only on light skin
head turned ~20deg — lower capture-quality, still a valid face

rgbdFixtures.note: RECORDED on a real TrueDepth front camera; carries a real disparity aux channel. Large file — gitignore it or LFS it; the depth test XCTSkips when absent.
